name: The Lost Condor - Walking Simulator
short_description: Explore the ruins of Machu Picchu, the ancient city of Peru. Listen to the sounds of birds, wind, and walk under a waterfall. This is a very short walking simulator. There is no story, objective, or interactive objects.
detailed_description:
The Lost Condor is a very short first person walking simulator where you can explore Machu Picchu, the ancient city of Peru. Listen to the sounds of birds, wind, walk under a waterfall and explore the ruins. There is no story, objective, or interactive objects. This is a semirealistic, low polygon recreation of Machu Picchu inspired by action-adventure games of the late 90s.

Note:

The video trailer is outdated, the screenshots were updated Mar 31, 2023.

Seizure Warning:

This video game contains visual effects, including flashing lights and rapid color changes, which may trigger epileptic seizures or other adverse reactions in susceptible individuals. If you or anyone in your household has a history of epilepsy or photosensitive seizures, please consult a medical professional before playing this game.
